Our Founding Promise

Your Health Is Our Sacred Mission

"Nirog Kaya" — a body free of disease. Every patient who walks through our doors carries our deepest commitment: to heal with knowledge, serve with compassion, and never let healthcare feel out of reach.

🙏 Compassionate Care 🔬 Evidence-Based Medicine ❤️ Patient-First Always 🌿 Holistic Healing

About the Doctor

Healing with Knowledge,
Care & Compassion

Dr. Kamlesh Kumar founded Nirog Kaya Foundation with a single vision — to make world-class healthcare accessible to every family in Greater Noida. With over 12 years of clinical excellence, he combines evidence-based medicine with a deeply human, patient-first approach.

The name Nirog Kaya — meaning "a body free of disease" — reflects his philosophy: true health is not just the absence of illness, but the presence of vitality, balance and wellness.

🩺

Patient-First Care

Every consultation starts with listening — really listening — to understand your health story.

🔬

Evidence-Based

Treatments grounded in the latest clinical research and best medical practices.

🌿

Holistic Approach

Addressing physical, mental and lifestyle factors for complete, lasting wellness.

🤝

Trusted for 12+ Years

A pillar of the Greater Noida community, trusted by thousands of families.

Schedule a Consultation
What We Treat

Comprehensive Medical Services

From routine check-ups to complex chronic disease management — all under one trusted roof.

🩺
General Medicine

Comprehensive diagnosis and treatment for fevers, infections, viral illnesses, body pain, fatigue and all acute medical conditions. Your first call for any health concern.

Primary Care ↗
👶
Paediatric Care

Gentle, child-friendly consultations for infants, toddlers and adolescents. Growth monitoring, vaccinations, nutritional guidance and illness management.

Child Health ↗
🌸
Women's Health

Dedicated care for women across all life stages — hormonal health, PCOD, anaemia, thyroid disorders, prenatal guidance and preventive screenings.

Women's Wellness ↗
🩸
Diabetes Management

Personalised diabetes care plans with regular monitoring, lifestyle counselling, medication management and complication prevention strategies.

Chronic Care ↗
❤️
Cardiac & BP Care

Hypertension management, ECG monitoring, cardiac risk assessment and lifestyle modification programs to protect your heart health long-term.

Cardiology ↗
🧘
Preventive Health

Annual health check-ups, full body diagnostics, vaccination programmes, diet planning and wellness coaching to keep illness at bay before it starts.

Prevention ↗
🦴
Bone & Joint Care

Assessment and management of arthritis, joint pain, back pain, vitamin D deficiency, osteoporosis and musculoskeletal disorders affecting daily life.

Orthopaedics ↗
🧠
Mental Wellness

Compassionate support for stress, anxiety, insomnia, mild depression and burnout. Counselling, lifestyle therapy and referral coordination as needed.

Wellbeing ↗
🔬
Diagnostics & Labs

We coordinate with trusted certified labs for all your diagnostic needs — blood work, urine analysis, thyroid panels, lipid profiles, HbA1c, and more, with fast turnaround on reports.

Diagnostics ↗

FAQ

Your Questions, Answered

Can't find your answer here? Call us at +91 93118 94054 and our team will help you right away.

💬
Still have a question?

Our team replies within minutes on WhatsApp.

Chat on WhatsApp
Do I need an appointment or can I walk in?
+
Both are welcome! Walk-ins are accepted during clinic hours (Mon–Sat, 9 AM – 6 PM; Sun, 9 AM – 2 PM). However, to avoid waiting time, we recommend booking an appointment in advance via phone or WhatsApp.
What should I bring to my first consultation?
+
Bring any previous medical records, test reports, prescription medicines you are currently taking, and a list of your symptoms. This helps Dr. Kamlesh give you the most accurate assessment from your very first visit.
Does Dr. Kamlesh treat children and senior citizens?
+
Absolutely! Nirog Kaya Foundation offers dedicated paediatric care for children and specialised geriatric consultations for elderly patients. Dr. Kumar has extensive experience treating patients of all age groups.
Can you help arrange lab tests?
+
We coordinate with trusted certified labs for all diagnostic investigations including blood tests, urine analysis, blood sugar, ECG, and more. We help arrange your tests and ensure you get results quickly.
What is the consultation fee?
+
Consultation fees are kept affordable to ensure healthcare is accessible to all. Please call us at +91 93118 94054 for current fee details. We believe quality healthcare should never be out of reach.
Is emergency care available on Sundays?
+
For genuine medical emergencies on Sundays or after hours, please call +91 93118 94054. Dr. Kamlesh Kumar and his team make every effort to be available when patients need urgent care the most.
